creator: decke@bluelife.at
text:
Please check the output of "kldstat" if any of the virtualbox kernel
modules is loaded and /var/log/messages if an error message was logged
when the loader tried to load vboxdrv.ko. You could try to manually
load vboxdrv.ko but that could freeze your machine (different problem).

Probably your kernel and sources are out of sync or something similar.

-- 
Bernhard Froehlich
http://www.bluelife.at/
